basic_details.job_title: NFSU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Library Apprentice/ Trainee Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) Library Apprentice/Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website www.nfsu.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc)
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade (50% for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nfsu.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee posts is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with a minimum of 55% marks. For SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates, a minimum of 50% marks is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Library Apprentice/Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Apprentice/Trainee post is 26 years. Age relaxation will be provided for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Library Apprentice/Trainee role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of Rs. 25,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Library Apprentice/Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Library Apprentice/Trainee position at the National Forensic Sciences University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NFSU Library Apprentice/Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Forensic Sciences University located?
faq.answer: The National Forensic Sciences University is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. When will the programme start after selection?
faq.answer: The programme is scheduled to commence on 01st July 2026.
